title: epidendrum iltisorum
intro: Epidendrum iltisorum, also known as the 'Dancing Ladies' orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Epidendrum iltisorum are derived from its roots and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Epidendrum iltisorum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
